title: Create: With Friends
description: Light-weight Create mod Aeronautics pack for Multiplayer.
body:
Light-weight Create mod pack centered around drilling and the mineral economy.

Use your starting tools to find and claim a mineral deposit.

Crush and refined ore minerals into metals. Trade your local resources with players. Earn currency by trading with players or generate currency through the diamond trade. Use your wealth to buy goods and services from other players, or spend excess money on cosmetics and rare items only obtainable from the bountiful market.

Many recipes and loot-tables have been altered to remove sources of renewable resources to push players towards cooperation and economy.
